workflows.name: image-basic
workflows.description: Generates images using ComfyUI's built-in default model. Works out of the box with a standard ComfyUI installation. Lower quality than other options.
workflows.prompt_guidance: Use Standard Diffusion optimized, comma-separated descriptive tags and style keywords. More important keywords should be listed first as they are given priority. Negative prompts are supported.

workflows.name: flux2
workflows.description: Generates images using ComfyUI's built-in Flux 2 model. Good for general purpose image generation.
workflows.prompt_guidance: Use natural language descriptions rather than comma-separated tags. Negative prompts are not supported by this model.
